title: lithophragma glabrum subsp. bulbiferum
intro: Lithophragma glabrum subsp. bulbiferum is a plant species in the Saxifragaceae family, commonly known as the woodland star. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, providing health benefits such as soothing skin irritations and reducing inflammation. Lithophragma glabrum subsp. bulbiferum is used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water.
